core.notes: Stable command descriptors, begin/end action attributes, shortcut option metadata, keyboard, mouse, and scroll shortcut resolution, configurable shortcut overrides, command hints, repeat suppression, UDB-style Go To Coordinates and Toggle Info Panel action aliases, explicit Properties command binding, flag and Custom Fields command availability rules including selected sidedefs, Full UDB action manager parity remains incomplete.

Compiler and nodebuilder configuration metadata is parsed, including recursive cfg discovery and UDB-style first-definition wins behavior for duplicate compiler names. Nodebuilder `%FI` and `%FO` argument substitution, compiler support-file resolution and staging, UDB-style nodebuilder process start settings, and UDB-style nodebuilder process result handling are covered. ACC-style `%FI`, `%FO`, `%FS`, `%PT`, and `%PS` script compiler argument substitution, UDB-style directory and archive script compile planning, ACS map-script and external-library compile preflight checks, ACS include resolution and temp-directory copying, UDB-style ACC and BCC process start settings, compiler temporary-input error remapping, ACS include error source resolution, ACC, BCC, and ZT-BCC compiler error line parsing including temporary path cleanup, and UDB-style script compiler error list formatting and de-duplication are covered. Full nodebuilder execution, script compiler execution, and editor integration remain incomplete.

Game configuration parsing and thing catalog metadata are partial. Script configuration loading, exact UDB script type name parsing, UDB-style script type detection, UDB-style script navigator entries, UDB-style script configuration selection rules, script snippet loading, map-lump script configuration resolution, script lexer keyword set preparation, script autocomplete entry preparation, function calltip argument tracking, calltip argument highlighting, and static-limit defaults plus visplane interpolation are covered. Recent actor merge parity includes locked sprites, bright and dynamic light recalculation, blocking severity preservation, UDB stuck-inside error checks for solid actors, non-solid error-check preservation, DistanceCheck preservation for undefined CVARs, unknown preview sprite fallback, MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors, and explicit-category-only replacement recategorization.

Avalonia editor controls cover the main shell, menus, toolbar, status area with active game configuration, tested mode, snap-grid, and coordinate detail formatting, settings, shortcuts, recent files, error/status history, auto-clear sidedef texture toggle, selection groups, map markers, custom fields with quoted string preservation, basic property dialogs, explicit selected-element Properties command, Insert at Cursor toolbar access, universal handler option lists for boolean, enum, byte-angle, integer degree-angle, decimal degree-angle, and thing-class editors, including the standalone custom-fields dialog, dynamic custom-field type metadata persistence, active external game-configuration picker rows, UDB-style script document tab identity with persisted view settings, script compiler error routing by tab type, and script tab title updates. Full UDB control set parity remains incomplete.

Resource list serialization, WAD, PK3 and directory resources including ignored path filters, nested PK3, mixed priority stack, palette lookup, default gray PLAYPAL fallback, nearest PLAYPAL color lookup, ARGB-to-index quantization, indexed image generation, colormap, sprite, texture, flat, hires, voxel, model discovery behavior, UDB-style script find-usages matching, and script resource identity with resource-scoped usage results have focused coverage. Full UDB DataManager parity remains incomplete.
Patch data model, thing parsing, frame parsing, sprite replacements, parser behavior, and thing catalog merge support exist. Full UDB baseline DehackedData table processing remains incomplete.

Selection conversion, duplicate, copy helpers, marked-geometry cloning with virtual sectors, virtual-sector cleanup preservation, stable selection-group action ids and clear-group shortcuts, Select Single-sided and Select Double-sided linedef filtering, Flip Linedefs selected-linedef and sector behavior, Flip Sidedefs selected-linedef behavior, Filter Selected Things selection narrowing, Change Map Element Index single-selection reordering, Align Linedefs selected-linedef and sector behavior, fixed-step selected or highlighted sector floor and ceiling height changes, configured brightness-level changes for selected or highlighted sectors, stable file action, Map Options, Preferences, Game Configurations, Test Map, Things Filters setup, Reload Resources, Grid Setup, Snap Selection to Grid, tag statistics, thing statistics, Go To Coordinates, fixed thing scale, always-show-vertices, dynamic grid sizing, grid transform action ids, Join Sectors and Merge Sectors command actions, selected vertex, linedef endpoint, and thing snap-to-grid mutation, paste tag remapping for tag-typed action arguments, one-shot Paste Special options, Prefabs menu action surface with Insert Previous Prefab runtime command, paste-properties snapshots, selective applier, active-mode menu wiring, options dialog, highlight fallback, stitching, merge geometry mode, tag helpers, owner-specific tag allocation, format-aware tag searches/statistics/replacement and next-free-tag allocation including tag-typed action arguments, tag statistics label editing, named flags, custom fields, UDB-style things filter validation, format-aware things filter criteria, UDB-style withdraw-undo and grouped undo behavior, separate undo/redo history clearing, undo/redo selection clearing and UI labels, custom things filter draft write-back, custom filter list management, connected wall texture auto-alignment, texture-fit offset wrapping, and several edit-mode surfaces are covered. Full UDB editing mode parity remains incomplete.

Editor startup, window placement, last-used game configuration startup selection, last-used map folder picker selection, dirty-state prompts, reload, close, autosave recovery, recent files and maps, UDB-style numbered recent menu presentation with long-path trimming, active-config new map format selection, status history, error logs, update-check replacement, file conflict checks, before/after command launch plans with editable commands, working directories, and behavior flags in map options, UDB-style nodebuilder output validation, UDB-style auto-clear sidedef texture preference persistence, UDB-style Test Map token expansion, and Test Map skill menu modeling are covered. Full UDB application orchestration remains incomplete.

Focused parity exists for point-in-polygon, Hermite spline helpers, thing absolute-Z calculation, thing-to-line alignment, sector linedef orientation flipping, sector bounding boxes, point intersection, floor and ceiling planes, sidedef lightfog maintenance, sector fade color selection, flat and wall texture floodfill, explicit-end closest path tracing, traced-side sector joining, traced-side sector creation, loop sector creation, one-sided sector line normalization, marked action and tag tools, config-aware sidedef Y-offset normalization, triangulation-based sector label positions, linedef measurement, linedef grid intersections, nearest vertex, linedef and thing queries, snapping, map-wide range wrappers, blockmap traversal, and selected geometry stitching helpers. Full trace paths, curve tools, triangulation, frustum behavior, broader label placement, and validation remain incomplete.
The editor shell exposes 2D and 3D mode entry points, toolbar/menu wiring, shortcuts, and visual-mode scaffolding. Full GZBuilder visual editing behavior remains incomplete.

Doom, Hexen, and UDMF map loading and writing have focused compatibility coverage, including invalid element filtering, unsigned binary fields, UDMF block and field order, custom fields, stream facades, map conversion, config-aware WAD and PK3 embedded-WAD map discovery, and PK3/WAD resource IO. Directory and PK3 resource options expose root textures and flats like UDB, and nested directory WAD high-resolution replacements participate in priority order. Classic texture composition honors UDB patch offset compatibility flags and WAD patch fallback ordering around flat ranges. Full universal IO parity remains incomplete.

Map model coverage includes element collections, map options, grid setup persistence, persisted grid background scale limits, selection groups, marks, tags, argument handling, custom UDMF field name validation and quoted string preservation for editable fields, property copying, clone and clipboard snapshots, binary format cleanup, blockmap population, UDB-style sidedef unused texture cleanup, map-level sidedef texture cleanup, traced-side sector joining, and several geometry mutation helpers. Full UDB MapSet behavior remains incomplete.

Basic vertex, thing, linedef, sidedef, sector, UDMF flag, custom field, map marker, map options, and namespace dialogs are present, including linedef and sidedef texture fields, sector flat fields, selected linedef, thing, sector, and sidedef UDMF flag editing, selected sidedef custom-fields editing, configured universal fields in the standalone custom-fields dialog, raw string value preservation in custom-field text editing, and dynamic custom-field type metadata persistence. Full UDB property panel and field editor parity remains incomplete.

Full UDB renderer and visual mode rendering parity remains incomplete.

WAD, PK3, nested PK3, directory, mixed stack, texture, flat, patch, sprite, hires, voxel, model, camera texture, dynamic bitmap, unknown image, nested WAD folder-resource and hires priority, editor add-resource options for WAD, PK3, directory resources, required archives, required-archive default detection, configuration-resource required-archive default mapping, MODELDEF model resource lookup, UDB-style supported model skin texture extension probing, defined texture, basename texture, and sprite fallback for model skin images, and cache invalidation behavior have focused coverage. Full lazy loading, advanced namespace behavior, and UDB DataManager parity remain incomplete.

Game configuration types, thing metadata, argument render metadata, map format flags, texture definitions, and ZDoom data structures are partially modeled. Full UDB type system parity remains incomplete.

Mode switching, 3D entry, selected geometry editing surfaces, command shortcuts, status hints, rendering scaffolding, visual vertex handle floor/ceiling pair modeling, explicit height-offset state, adjacent-sector height fallback, visual slope sidedef and vertex handle placement and pivot models, UDB-style visual slope handle selection and single-pivot toggling constraints, UDB-style adjacent options dialog routing, visual selected wall texture fitting actions, visual texture auto-align actions, visual upper and lower unpegged toggle actions, visual thing relative movement, cursor placement, scale, visibility cycling, and Align Things to Nearest Linedef action alias, visual culling deduplication, and culled 3D thing billboard drawing exist. Full UDB visual mode tools and interaction behavior remain incomplete.

Main window, dialogs for open map with active-config candidate filtering, sidecar game-configuration loading by resolved path, script-compiler override/default selection, strict-patch toggling, and config-aware long-texture-name toggling, settings, game configuration selection with active-row matching, active external cfg rows, per-configuration resource editing and persistence, and tested required-archive default mapping, shortcuts, status history, errors, autosave recovery, selection groups, custom fields including selected sidedefs, configured universal field rows, raw string value preservation, and dynamic field type persistence, map markers, map options including compiled ACS script compiler selection, resource options with tested UDB-compatible option mapping, grid setup with named background source choices, percent background scale fields, background texture and flat browsers, background image file picking, show-background toggling and disabled-state behavior, structured single-element info panels including tested vertex, linedef, thing, sector, and sidedef rows plus previews, tested map overview and multi-selection info summaries, and info-panel collapse and expand command behavior are present. Full UDB window and docking system parity remains incomplete.

DECORATE and ZScript parsers cover many actor metadata, state preview, goto, user variable, region, DoomEdNum, DamageType, DECORATE include validation, DECORATE state cast validation, DECORATE user-variable validation, inherited user-variable shadow validation, ZScript include validation, ZScript preprocessor validation, ZScript top-level version declarations, ZScript top-level const validation, ZScript top-level enum validation, ZScript top-level struct validation, ZScript top-level identifier validation, ZScript class body terminator validation, ZScript duplicate class and mixin validation, ZScript fatal final and sealed inheritance constraints, ZScript actor and mixin self-inheritance rejection, ZScript mixin parent validation, ZScript mixin user-variable default behavior, ZScript mixin size-default behavior, ZScript extension size-default behavior, ZScript extension ordering validation, ZScript extended Spawn inheritance, and actor merge behaviors, including MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors. TEXTURES, MODELDEF, SNDINFO, SNDSEQ, TERRAIN, LOCKDEFS, DECALDEF, VOXELDEF, IWADINFO, CVARINFO, REVERBS, X11 RGB, MAPINFO, ZMAPINFO, and GLDEFS all have focused parser coverage. TEXTURES includes default-scale composition metadata, UDB-style Graphic skipping, UDB-style unknown declaration consumption, namespace-specific duplicate handling, and UDB-order patch flip/rotation transforms. MODELDEF validates supported model file extensions, non-negative model-related indexes, invalid model resource path characters, duplicate frame declarations, empty Path values, and orientation-flag recovery after unknown directives, and parses transform, actor pitch/roll, rotation-center, and named frame metadata. GLDEFS covers lights, objects, glow metadata, skyboxes, includes, invalid declaration abort behavior, and unknown structure handling. Full actor semantics, model rendering, voxel rendering, and broader ZDoom data integration remain incomplete.

DBuilder uses a documented and tested cross-platform Silk.NET OpenGL rendering abstraction. Runtime GLSL shader compilation through DBuilder.Rendering.Shader replaces the current UDB GLShader/GLShaderManager subset. Full UDB native OpenGL parity remains incomplete.

plugins.notes: GZDoom 3D floor data resolution, multi-tag target matching, managed UDMF control-sector filtering, selected-sector floor discovery, shared-floor filtering, display toggles, control-sector edit snapshots, control-sector mutation, orphan action-line cleanup, mode/action metadata, command catalog entries, control-sector area settings, custom tag range allocation, control-sector area placement planning, control-sector geometry materialization, action-line binding, slope vertex group persistence, slope data-sector fields, floor/ceiling plane application, selected slope vertex editing, sector plane binding helpers, draw-slope acceptance, group allocation, selected-sector binding, and data-sector persistence exist. Full 3DFloorMode save-back, editor window, slope drawing UI, and slope editing UI remain incomplete.

UDB-style automap model exists for line visibility, Doom/Hexen/Strife color presets, line color classification, secret-sector detection, lock-color resolution, format-aware UDMF and classic automap linedef flag handling, selected linedef secret/dontdraw flag toggles, selected sector textured-hidden automap flag toggles, mode metadata, persisted setting defaults, presentation layer descriptors, valid-linedef collection, highlight target planning, render planning for line draw order, highlight colors, and textured-background fallback, editor Automap Mode rendering with UDB-style valid-line colors and textured-sector visibility, hover highlighting, click toggles for highlighted line and sector automap flags, and toolbar-backed persisted show-hidden-lines, show-secret-sectors, show-locks, show-textures, and color-preset options. Full plugin lifecycle and docked workflow remain incomplete.

Blockmap construction, queries, editor overlay toggles, raw BLOCKMAP lump parsing, shared block-list queries, questionable offset helpers, missing-line counts, malformed lump diagnostics, parsed BLOCKMAP highlighted-block/shared-list/questionable-offset overlays, UDB-style action metadata, window command dispatch, and a non-modal Blockmap Explorer summary/block-list window exist. Full mode workflow and docked workflow remain incomplete.

Selected map effect helpers exist, including slope and 3D floor related behavior. UDB-style jitter transform helpers exist for vertices, sector floor and ceiling heights, and things, including safe-distance clamping, offset modes, angle snapping, height offsets, pitch, roll, and scale. UDB-style directional shading calculations exist for sectors and sidedefs, including cached initial lights, absolute light handling, sun-angle vectors, and sector lightcolor fields. UDB-style Wavefront OBJ terrain parsing, triangular sector geometry building, and current-map editor import command exist, including axis conversion, face filtering, shared edges, selected output, and vertex-height support. Full BuilderEffects plugin UI remains incomplete.

Find/replace includes within-current-selection scoping, UDB-style replace availability rules, basic numeric, tag, texture, and flat categories plus UDB-style element index, sector height, sector brightness comparison prefixes, any-effect matching, generalized sector effect matching, explicit sidedef texture slot, sector flat slot, wildcard texture and flat matching, combined texture-or-flat wildcard search, thing angle, comma-separated thing type lists, linedef and thing action-with-arguments with any-action and named script arg0str matching, generalized linedef action bit matching, linedef, sidedef, sector, and thing flags, linedef, sector, and thing tag categories, linedef and thing action-argument reference categories, and wildcard UDMF field categories for any, vertex, linedef, sidedef, sector, and thing fields. Map error checking includes UDB-style fix actions for stray vertices, off-grid vertices, overlapping vertices, vertices overlapping linedefs, missing textures, unknown textures, unused textures, unused thing default flags, missing flats, unknown flats, missing-front linedefs, sidedness flag mismatches, thing deletion error results, unknown thing script deletion, unknown action and sector effect removals, action-driven lower texture checks for floor lower/raise specials, 3D floor texture requirements, Plane_Align missing-texture suppression, Static_Init sky-transfer texture handling, required-slot texture alignment checks, UDB-style sky-flat upper texture suppression, context-independent fractional-coordinate off-grid checks, UDMF-only zero-length-inclusive short-linedef checks, UDB map-size, overlapping linedef, empty/unclosed/invalid sector, stray and overlapping vertex, missing-sidedef and sidedness mismatch, missing/unknown/unused/misaligned texture and flat, missing-activation, unknown linedef-script, unknown action/effect, stuck-thing, unknown/obsolete/unused thing, and polyobject diagnostics, invalid-sector dissolve fixes, per-element ignored error-check suppression, selected-result description copy, and selected-result ignore, show-all, select-type, and type-filter UI. Full mode set, edit-selection transform panel workflow, fully docked undo/redo panel workflow, full image export format/options UI, slope arch UI handle workflow, fully persistent select-similar options UI, remaining find/replace object types, remaining error result fixes, and docked tooling remain incomplete.

UDB-style RGB/HSV conversion, picker display formatting, typed HEX and float color input parsing, packed UDMF color integers, sector lightcolor/fadecolor field behavior, separate sector color field drafts, selected-sector editor color command with UDMF guard, sector dialog title, sector-color label, typed HEX and float input fields, paired-field apply behavior, dynamic light picker metadata, color storage, slider labels, control visibility, slider limits, fixed-value capture, selection-wide color mutation, radius/interval mutation rules, and editor command/dialog wiring with availability gating for selected UDB internal dynamic light things exist. Full color picker controls and GLDEFS actor-light editor wiring remain incomplete.

UDB-style comment grouping over vertex, linedef, sidedef, sector, and thing UDMF fields exists, including current-mode filtering, set/remove helpers, selection targets with sector boundary propagation, edit targets with sidedef-to-linedef conversion, padded square view-area calculation, UDB-style comment icon render planning, toggle command metadata, docker command metadata, window command dispatch, UDB-style filter-mode and click-select persisted setting keys, editor panel option wiring, editor comment icon rendering for linedefs, sectors, and things, live mode and selection refresh wiring, and a non-modal editor comments panel for setting selected-element comments, selecting groups, and removing grouped comments. Full docked UI remains incomplete.

An editor Image Example mode renders an overlay-only screen-space image like the UDB sample mode. It has UDB-style action metadata and 2D command dispatch, and is wired as a built-in Tools menu command until the full plugin loader and embedded-resource sample plugin workflow exist.

Nodebuilder lump validation, related IO helpers, and UDB-style classic NODES/SEGS/VERTEXES/SSECTORS data parsing exist, including BSP child flags, parent links, seg angles, vertices, subsectors, seg-to-subsector links, classic subsector polygon clipping for visualization, classic subsector hit testing by BSP traversal plus polygon containment, and editor subsector overlay rendering. UDB-supported ZNODES headers are recognized, and compressed or uncompressed ZNODES payload extraction exists. UDB-style action metadata, window command dispatch, and a non-modal editor Nodes Viewer show classic parser status plus node, seg, and subsector summaries. Full ZNODES structure parsing and full NodesViewer visualization UI remain incomplete.
